description: SLACKER RAID INQUIRY PREWTJSKS REPORT Resolution Ordering Investigation Into Wholesale Seizures Particularly Here and Authority by Which Roundup Was Conducted May Pass Today SENATORS DENOUNCE PROCEDURE AS WILSON SEEKS EXPLANATON By SAM W SMALL JR Staff Correspondent Universal Service WASHINGTON Sept sThe Senate will pass a resolution tomorrow au thorizing an investigation by the Committee on Military Affairs to find out who was responsible for the sen sational slacker raid in New York City in which upward of 40000 men were placed under arrest President Wilson wrote to Attorney General Gregory today asking for a detailed report on the raid Senator Smoot offered a resolution authorizing the Senate Committee on Military Affairs to conduct an inquiry This is to find out by whose authority these raids were undertaken and especially by whose authority soldiers sailors National Guards and civilians were employed in the wholesale ar rests of citizens apparently without due process of law bitterly denounced The New York raid provoked the most bitter denunciations of the em ployment of mflitary force in place of civil procedure that have been heard since the United States went to war with Germany Senator Hiram John son of California said it was nothing
